derived_fields.name: HighAlert30dReadmit
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN upper(coalesce(HIGH_ALERT_30D_READMIT_src_1, HIGH_ALERT_30D_READMIT_src_2)) IN ('Y', 'N') THEN upper(coalesce(HIGH_ALERT_30D_READMIT_src_1, HIGH_ALERT_30D_READMIT_src_2)) ELSE NULL END

derived_fields.name: DiabeticIndicator
derived_fields.expression: CASE WHEN upper(coalesce(DIABETIC_INDICATOR_src_1, DIABETIC_INDICATOR_src_2)) IN ('Y', 'N') THEN upper(coalesce(DIABETIC_INDICATOR_src_1, DIABETIC_INDICATOR_src_2)) ELSE NULL END

derived_fields.name: RecordHash
derived_fields.expression: md5(concat_ws('|', coalesce(MEMBER_ID_src_1, MEMBER_ID_src_2), CAST(coalesce(ACTUAL_ADMIT_DATE_src_1, ACTUAL_ADMIT_DATE_src_2) AS STRING), coalesce(FACILITY_NAME_src_1, FACILITY_NAME_src_2), coalesce(CONFINE_STATUS_src_1, CONFINE_STATUS_src_2), coalesce(AUTH_ID_src_1, AUTH_ID_src_2), coalesce(PLAN_ID_src_1, PLAN_ID_src_2), coalesce(SUB_GROUP_src_1, SUB_GROUP_src_2)))

derived_fields.name: EncounterGroupId
derived_fields.expression: concat(coalesce(MEMBER_ID_src_1, MEMBER_ID_src_2), '_', CAST(coalesce(ACTUAL_ADMIT_DATE_src_1, ACTUAL_ADMIT_DATE_src_2) AS STRING))
